name: Peppermint Candy Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease an 8-inch square baking pan.
2. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl; set aside.
3. Melt chocolate with butter together; let cool slightly.
4. In another bowl, beat eggs and sugar until light and fluffy. Add the melted chocolate mixture and stir until well combined.
5. Fold in the dry ingredients, chopped nuts, and crushed peppermint candy.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out with moist, but not wet, crumbs.
8. Allow the brownies to cool before cutting into squares.
